title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
summary: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
briefing: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.

title: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
summary: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
briefing: Bitcoin could be absent from the world's top five assets by market cap until 2036, despite an estimate seeing the BTC bear market being nearly 70% complete.

title: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
summary: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
briefing: Security researchers warn that deprecated smart contracts can remain vulnerable long after projects stop maintaining them.

title: Grayscale applies traditional finance models to AAVE, sees $175 value
summary: Grayscale applies traditional finance models to AAVE, sees $175 value
briefing: Grayscale and CoinShares are applying traditional valuation techniques to crypto assets as institutions explore revenue-generating DeFi protocols.

title: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
summary: Ryan Salame’s wife to face charges over FTX-funded congressional run
briefing: A federal judge has denied a bid from Michelle Bond, the wife of former FTX executive Ryan Salame, to have campaign finance charges against her dismissed.

title: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
summary: Florida man pleads guilty for promoting $1.8B ‘HyperFund’ crypto fraud
briefing: Rodney “Bitcoin Rodney” Burton faces a maximum sentence of five years in federal prison for conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Dorsey’s Block says new AI tool handles 15% of code work
summary: Dorsey’s Block says new AI tool handles 15% of code work
briefing: Builderbot is the “missing layer between AI coding tools and how engineering actually works at scale,” said Brad Axen, head of AI capabilities at Block.

title: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
summary: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
briefing: Outgoing CME chief Terry Duffy says perpetual futures are actually swaps under Dodd-Frank, and that the exchange will file suit Thursday.

title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
summary: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
briefing: BTC slid to around $64,100 after Kevin Warsh's hawkish debut, but analysts argue a $60,000 floor and catalysts could spark a rebound.

title: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow
summary: France to Phase Out Non-Quantum Encryption as Bitcoin Security Concerns Grow
briefing: French authorities said that government cybersecurity researchers will stop certifying security products that lack quantum-resistant encryption beginning in 2027.

title: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
summary: Psychologists Say Patients Are Bringing AI Into Therapy Sessions: Survey
briefing: A new APA survey found that more than a third of psychologists have patients using AI as an additional mental health professional, even as clinicians warn that the technology can reinforce delusions.

title: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
summary: Michigan Federal Judge Rules Sports Prediction Markets Are Not Under CFTC Purview
briefing: The judge said Polymarket is not likely to succeed on the merits of its case against Michigan state regulators.

title: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
summary: SpaceX Surge Could Be Worth Billions for FTX—Will Creditors Benefit?
briefing: Defunct crypto exchange FTX gained exposure to SpaceX in 2022, and the rocket-maker’s post-IPO rally has lifted hopes among creditors.

title: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
summary: Nvidia Built Robots That Train Themselves Using AI Coding Agents
briefing: Nvidia's ENPIRE hands an entire robot fleet to coding agents like Codex and Claude Code, letting them write training code, test it on real hardware, and improve without a human watching.

title: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
summary: CoinFund, Coinbase Back Stablecoin Payments Startup Trace Finance in $32 Million Raise
briefing: Stablecoin infrastructure firm Trace Finance said Wednesday that it raised a $32 million Series A round to help expand its reach.
